---
name: False negative
about: The skill missed something it should have caught
title: "[False negative] "
labels: false-negative
---

**What did the skill miss?**

What should have been flagged.

**Where is the signal?**

File path, field name, SDK, package, URL pattern, or whatever the skill should have detected.

**Skill version**

Release tag or commit hash.

**Anything else?**
